title: cynoglossum virginianum var. boreale
intro: Cynoglossum virginianum var. boreale, also known as Northern Hound's Tongue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum virginianum var. boreale include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
